summary: Full backend + frontend test of Palette Match MVP. 26/26 pytest cases pass after fixing one ObjectId leak in POST /api/proposals. All AI flows (brief, matching, pricing) confirmed working with Claude Sonnet 4.5; Isabella Moreau scored 98% on the Naples coastal brief as expected. Full frontend flow verified end-to-end with DB-injected session: landing → browse → artist profile → intake wizard (5 steps) → AI matches → dashboard.

issues: Marcus Hale portfolio thumbnail right-half renders as blank gray block — portfolio array only has 1 item but grid expects 3, leaving empty placeholders. Cosmetic only.

action_items: (Optional) Cosmetic: in MatchesPage artist card, render fewer portfolio slots when artist has <3 portfolio works, instead of empty gray boxes.

(Optional) Seed artist reviews_count values (e.g. Isabella=27) are not backed by actual review documents — first real review recomputes count to 1. Either add seed review docs or document seed counts as decorative only.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: POST /api/proposals was leaking MongoDB _id (ObjectId) causing 500 — same class of bug main agent claimed was fixed across all insert sites but this endpoint was missed. Now `doc.pop('_id', None)` after insert_one. All other insert sites (projects, matches, messages, reviews, escrows, users, sessions) verified clean either by using update_one+find_one with projection or by popping _id.
Auth `get_current_user` correctly accepts both Cookie and Bearer token — verified.
ACL coverage is good: project GET, proposal accept, proposal submit, message post all enforce ownership/role. Verified via tests.
AI fallback in /projects/{id}/match is sensible if LLM returns nothing.

Suggestion: server.py is 878 lines — consider splitting into routers (auth, artists, projects, proposals, messages, reviews, ai) for maintainability before adding more endpoints. Not blocking for MVP.
test_credentials: DB-injection per /app/memory/test_credentials.md. UI session: user_id=ui-test-collector-1780008581313, session_token=ui_test_session_1780008581315 (injected into MongoDB test_database for the browser test).
seed_data_creation: Created one ephemeral collector user + session in mongo for UI test (cleaned by app on its own only when sessions expire); pytest fixtures create + delete TEST_ prefixed users/sessions/projects/proposals/messages/reviews around each session.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Re-run pytest with `cd /app && MONGO_URL=mongodb://localhost:27017 DB_NAME=test_database REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://palette-match-12.preview.emergentagent.com python -m pytest backend/tests/test_palette_match.py -v`. AI calls take 5-15s — fixtures use timeout=90s. To create a fresh UI session: use mongosh snippet in /app/memory/test_credentials.md. Frontend cookie injection works (httpOnly=false because page.add_cookies semantics differ from the backend's set_cookie). Stripe escrow is MOCKED — no real payment calls made; status transitions deposit_held → released via mongo only.
rca_of_the_issue: POST /api/proposals built a dict `doc`, called `db.proposals.insert_one(doc)` which Motor mutates by adding an ObjectId `_id` field into the same dict reference, then returned that dict. FastAPI's jsonable_encoder cannot serialize ObjectId → 500. Mitigation: `doc.pop('_id', None)` immediately after insert_one (consistent with how /messages and /reviews handle it). Reproduction: POST /api/proposals as a matched artist for a project → 500. After fix → 200 with proposal payload.
